message:
test(db): add 5 new test suites for search quality and resilience

Expand database test coverage with focused suites targeting previously
untested behaviors:

- diversity_dedup.rs: verify search result diversification logic
  correctly deduplicates near-identical messages while preserving
  distinct thread representation
- filter_pagination.rs: exercise filter + pagination combinations
  including edge cases (empty pages, exact-boundary offsets, mixed
  filters with limits)
- load_concurrency.rs: stress-test concurrent search and write
  operations to verify connection pool behavior under load
- logging_redaction.rs: confirm that sensitive fields (message bodies,
  agent names in certain contexts) are properly redacted in log output
- timeout_backpressure.rs: verify that slow queries trigger backpressure
  mechanisms and that timeout thresholds are respected under synthetic
  load

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
